name: Eventual
description: Multimodal data platform powered by Daft, a Python-native distributed query engine for images, video, audio and structured data at scale.

seo.title: Eventual — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Eventual: Multimodal data platform powered by Daft, a Python-native distributed query engine for images, video, audio and structured data at scale.

when_to_use: Distributed DataFrame queries over images, video, and audio data
ML data preprocessing pipelines on multimodal large datasets
Python-native ETL for unstructured AI training data at scale
Replacing Spark for Python-first AI data engineering teams
Parallel query engine for data science on heterogeneous media

pros: Scales across cluster without Spark baggage
cons: Very new category with smaller community
Daft still maturing vs Spark/Ray incumbents
review.verdict: Exciting multimodal data engine for ML teams; early-stage risk remains compared to Spark/Ray.
review.best_for: ML teams processing images, video, and audio at distributed scale in Python
review.not_for: Pure tabular analytics workloads where Spark or DuckDB suffice
